case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. EDUARDO TACCOLINI PAPP

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $582.07 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PAPP, EDUARDO TACCOLINI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST.. DEFENDANT EDUARDO TACCOLINI PAPP DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-05-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PAPP, EDUARDO TACCOLINI
